# Release Notes — Iranti vX.Y.Z

**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
**Version:** vX.Y.Z
**Previous version:** vX.Y.Z-1

---

## Summary

One or two sentences. What changed in this release and why it matters. Write for a developer who already knows Iranti and wants to decide whether to upgrade now or wait.

---

## New Features

List each new capability. For each item: what it does, what problem it solves, and any relevant command or API surface.

- **[Feature name]** — Description. Example usage if applicable.

---

## Fixes

List bugs resolved in this release. Be specific about the failure mode and the fix, not just the symptom.

- **[Component / area]** — What broke, what was wrong, what changed.

---

## Known Limitations

Be honest. List issues that are present in this version and not yet resolved. If a workaround exists, document it.

- **[Limitation]** — Describe the scope. Workaround: [if any].

---

## Upgrade Notes

Document anything that requires action from the operator or developer when upgrading. If this is a clean upgrade with no breaking changes, say so explicitly.

**Breaking changes:** None / [List any].

**Migration steps:**

1. Step one.
2. Step two.

**Configuration changes:** [Any new or changed config keys with their defaults.]

---

## Changelog

Link to the full CHANGELOG entry for this version:
`https://github.com/nfemmanuel/iranti/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#vXYZ`
